mapper.select: SELECT d.*, u.id AS uid, u.login_name, u.name AS uname FROM device d LEFT JOIN user u ON d.user_id = u.id ORDER BY d.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device(code, name, description, user_id) VALUES(#{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE device SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE device SET user_id = #{userId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT d.*, u.id AS uid, u.login_name, u.name AS uname FROM device d LEFT JOIN user u ON d.user_id = u.id
d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND u.login_name = #{loginName}
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
ORDER BY d.id
